name: Quality Industrial Corp.
summary: PART I Business Overview Quality Industrial Corp. (QIND, the Company, we, us, or our) is an industrial company specializing in the energy sector. Through our 51%-owned operating subsidiary, Al Shola Al Modea Gas Distribution L.L.C. (ASG or Al Shola Gas), we provide comprehensive solutions for the liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) industry.
